PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BBC INVESTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXTENSION MEDIA, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $3,998.25 RENT, $1,450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $487.50 COSTS, $9,195.63 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $2,062.50 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,068.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
